title: fairy blush — printable kindle insert
description:
your kindle deserves to look as good as your taste in books.

fairy blush is a printable kindle insert designed for the reader who takes their aesthetic seriously. dark, moody, and made to sit perfectly under your kindle case.

what you'll get: one high-resolution PDF — ready to print, trim, and slide in.

how to use it: download → print at 100% scale on best quality setting → trim → place under your kindle case. that's it.

before you print: colors may vary slightly depending on your printer and paper. for best results use white cardstock.

title: vintage writer book review — editable canva template
description:
your reading life deserves to look as good as your taste in books.

vintage writer book review is a fully editable canva template designed for readers who take their aesthetic seriously. track your reads, share your thoughts, or print and add to your journal — dark, moody, and completely yours to customise.

what you'll get: one PDF with your canva template link — fully editable, no canva pro account needed.

two sizes included: — standard 8.5" x 11" — compact 5" x 7" — perfect for printing and journaling

how to use it: open the canva link → customise to your taste → download as PNG → print. for the 5"x7" size — use the included printing template to fit multiple on one page for easy cutting.

printing tip: download as PNG at highest quality for best print results. colours may vary slightly depending on your printer.

please note: digital download only — nothing physical will be shipped. for personal use only, not for redistribution or resale.

title: dark bookshelf review — editable canva template
description:
your reading life deserves to look as good as your taste in books.

dark bookshelf review is a fully editable canva template designed for readers who take their aesthetic seriously. track your reads, share your thoughts, or print and add to your journal — dark, moody, and completely yours to customise.

what you'll get: one PDF with your canva template link — fully editable, no canva pro account needed.

two sizes included: — standard 8.5" x 11" — compact 5" x 7" — perfect for printing and journaling

how to use it: open the canva link → customise to your taste → download as PNG → print. for the 5"x7" size — use the included printing template to fit multiple on one page for easy cutting.

title: Pages I've Turned – Book Tracker Bookmark
description:
Elevate your reading journey with our Pages I've Turned book tracker bookmarks! Designed for book lovers, these stylish and practical trackers help you document every story you've devoured.

Key Features:

  • Elegant Design: Available in four chic colors – white, tan, light pink, and dark pink – to suit your aesthetic.
  • High-Quality Material: Made from thick, durable cardstock for a premium feel that stands up to daily use.
  • Double-Sided Functionality: Plenty of space to track your books, with fields for titles, start and finish dates, and ratings.
  • Perfect Size: At approximately 3.5" x 7.5", these trackers fit perfectly in your books while still providing ample writing space.

Whether you're documenting your latest binge-worthy read or keeping track of your book club picks, the Pages I've Turned bookmarks are your ultimate reading companion. Add a touch of organization and style to your bookshelf today!
